name: FabricCatalystAutoDeploy
description: Deploys Microsoft Fabric items from a Git-connected workspace using branch auto-discovery. Handles tiered deployment of Lakehouses, Warehouses, Notebooks, Semantic Models, Data Pipelines and Reports.
author: TechTacoFriday

inputs.name: azureSubscription
inputs.label: Azure Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure service connection with access to the Fabric tenant. Used to obtain tokens for the Fabric, Azure DevOps and Microsoft Graph APIs.

inputs.name: workspacePrefix
inputs.label: Workspace Prefix
inputs.helpMarkDown: Prefix used to name Fabric workspaces. The environment code is appended automatically, e.g. 'MyProduct' produces 'ws_MyProduct_dev'.

inputs.name: capacityName
inputs.label: Capacity Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Display name of the active Fabric capacity to assign workspaces to.

inputs.name: environmentList
inputs.label: Environments
inputs.helpMarkDown: JSON array of environments. Each entry requires 'code' (environment suffix) and 'gitEnabled' (1 = connect workspace to Git, 0 = skip). Example: [{"code":"dev","gitEnabled":1},{"code":"uat","gitEnabled":0}]

inputs.name: domainName
inputs.label: Domain Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fabric domain to assign the deployed workspaces to. Leave empty to skip domain assignment.

inputs.name: subDomainName
inputs.label: Sub-Domain Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fabric sub-domain. Only used when Domain Name is provided.

inputs.name: workspaceAdminsList
inputs.label: Workspace Administrators
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semicolon-separated list of UPNs to assign as Workspace Admin role. At least one admin is required so the workspace remains accessible after deployment. Example: user@contoso.com;group@contoso.com

inputs.name: workspaceContributorsList
inputs.label: Workspace Contributors
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semicolon-separated list of UPNs to assign as Workspace Contributor role. Leave empty to skip.

inputs.name: workspaceMembersList
inputs.label: Workspace Members
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semicolon-separated list of UPNs to assign as Workspace Member role. Leave empty to skip.

inputs.name: workspaceViewersList
inputs.label: Workspace Viewers
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semicolon-separated list of UPNs to assign as Workspace Viewer role. Leave empty to skip.

inputs.name: fabricGitConnectionName
inputs.label: Fabric Git Connection Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the Git connection already configured in the Fabric workspace (Settings > Git integration).

inputs.name: organizationName
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Organization
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps organization name (the part after dev.azure.com/).

inputs.name: projectName
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Project
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps project that contains the Fabric items repository.

inputs.name: repositoryName
inputs.label: Repository Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the Azure DevOps repository that holds the Fabric item definitions.

inputs.name: sourceBranchName
inputs.label: Source Branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: Branch from which Fabric items are discovered and deployed.

inputs.name: gitProviderType
inputs.label: Git Provider
inputs.helpMarkDown: Git provider hosting the repository: 'AzureDevOps' (same or external tenant) or 'GitHub'. When set to 'GitHub' or an external Azure DevOps tenant, supply a PAT via the External Git PAT field.

inputs.name: externalGitPat
inputs.label: External Git PAT
inputs.helpMarkDown: Personal Access Token for an external Azure DevOps tenant or a GitHub repository. Must reference a secret pipeline variable, e.g. $(ExternalGitPat). Leave empty when reading from the current Azure DevOps tenant.

inputs.name: itemsGitFolder
inputs.label: Fabric Items Folder
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path in the repository where Git-enabled Fabric items are stored. Must start with '/'.

inputs.name: useEmptyBranch
inputs.label: Create Empty Branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, creates a new empty branch in the workspace before syncing. Use for first-time deployments into a clean workspace.

inputs.name: forceRecreateBranch
inputs.label: Force Re-create Branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, deletes and re-creates the workspace branch if it already exists. Only use this when a branch needs to be reset (e.g. a previous run left the branch in a broken state). The default behaviour (disabled) skips branch creation and proceeds directly to connecting the workspace to Git.

inputs.name: createDeploymentPipeline
inputs.label: Create Deployment Pipeline
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, creates a Fabric deployment pipeline to promote items across environments.

inputs.name: deploymentPipelineName
inputs.label: Deployment Pipeline Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name for the Fabric deployment pipeline to create.

inputs.name: pipelineAdminsList
inputs.label: Pipeline Administrators
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semicolon-separated list of UPNs to assign as Pipeline Admin role.

inputs.name: enableDiagnostics
inputs.label: Enable Diagnostics
inputs.helpMarkDown: Outputs detailed diagnostic messages to the pipeline log. Use for troubleshooting only.
